hollow: Commissions won't end immediately upon leaving a Hollow when you Pause. You can log in to the HDD system at the workshop to resume them.
Resonia are a unique by-product of the Hollows. They contain Ether energy that can aid in your Hollow exploration. However, they are highly unstable and cannot be taken out of the Hollows.
Gear Coins are a special currency exclusively used in the Hollows. You can use Gear Coins to trade with Bangboo merchants for various items and supplies.
Bangboo merchants are robot traders traveling through the Hollows. These agile explorers carry a diverse selection of supplies and valuable items.
Pay attention to areas marked with a magnifier icon to gather more map info and unlock paths.
You'll suffer a random Corruption when squad Pressure reaches 100.
Events during Hollow exploration increase your Pressure.
Inside the Miasmic Field, bosses gain enhanced defenses. Use Disintegration to break weak points.
Observation Singularities reveal rare supplies on your map.
Fissure Beacons enable fast travel and restore HP.
Supply piles can only be collected once.
Small supply points respawn daily but have a weekly limit.
Agents exposed to Miasma suffer contamination that drains HP when maxed.
Miasma fades over time or can be removed with Purifiers.
Some enemy skills create Miasma Pools with extra effects.
Use Revelation on unstable structures to reveal hidden objects.
Use Insight on clues to generate guiding paths.
Some bosses activate Miasmic Fields boosting enemies.
city: The video store theme changes daily. Match customer preferences to increase income.
Bardic Needle provides Drive Disc services.
Waterfall Soup grants buffs before Hollow exploration.
Use the HDD System to start commissions.
141 Convenience Store offers a wide range of goods.
Use Random Play's car to travel to distant areas.
Use Inter-Knot to check schedule and claim rewards.
Use DM to manage messages and commissions.
Use Agent menu to upgrade characters.
Switch between Wise and Belle during free roam.
Free Roaming helps increase Inter-Knot level.
Enable Mission Focus to filter map markers.
combat: EX Special Attacks grant damage reduction and high damage.
Assist Attacks include Quick, Defensive, Evasive, and Follow-Up.
Five attributes exist: Ice, Fire, Electric, Physical, Ether.
Enemies gain resistance after Attribute Anomaly.
Some enemies are weak to specific attributes.
Low resistance is indicated by flashing damage numbers.
Each Agent builds Decibels individually.
Chain Attacks trigger on stunned enemies.
Some enemies have breakable parts.
Dodge can be used twice before cooldown.
Stunned enemies take increased damage.
Switching during attacks completes the action first.
Golden prompt = Perfect Assist, red = Perfect Dodge.
Dodge Counter, Assist, and Ultimates help break Miasmic Shields.
Max Miasma Contamination deals HP-based damage.
Enemies with Miasmic Shields cannot be stunned.
Breaking shields deals Purify damage and restores resources.
Rupture Agents deal Sheer Damage ignoring DEF.
Sheer Force increases Sheer Damage.
Adrenaline affects combat resource gain.
wiki: New Eridu is a thriving city full of opportunities and risks.
The Hollow Investigative Association manages Hollow operations.
Sixth Street is one of the most livable neighborhoods.
Miasma is an Ether derivative with hallucinogenic effects.
Miasma can condense into dangerous structures.
Failume Heights is a major residential area.
Waifei Peninsula is a resource-rich region.
Waifei's name comes from guarding anomalies.
Zenith Aerospace City is mostly lost to the Hollow.
